model.label: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview
model.description: Google • Preview Gemini model tuned for high-end multimodal reasoning and long-context analysis.

pick.rationale: Georgia enters this 8/9 matchup with a slight statistical edge over Saint Louis, ranking 31st in KenPom compared to the Billikens' 41st. The Bulldogs boast an elite offense that ranks in the top 15 nationally, which should provide enough firepower to navigate a solid but not overwhelming Saint Louis defense. While the Billikens have had an impressive 28-win season in the A-10, Georgia's battle-tested resume in the SEC and superior overall efficiency margin make them the confident pick to advance in what projects to be a fast-paced, high-scoring affair.

reasoningStep.title: Georgia vs Saint Louis Matchup Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Comparing overall efficiency, offensive/defensive metrics, and schedule strength between Georgia and Saint Louis.
evidence: Georgia ranks 31st in KenPom with a 20.47 adjusted efficiency margin, while Saint Louis ranks 41st with an 18.32 margin.
Georgia features an elite offense, ranking 15th nationally in KenPom adjusted offensive efficiency.
Saint Louis has a slightly better defense (ranked 56th in Torvik) compared to Georgia (93rd), but lacks the offensive firepower (51st) to match the Bulldogs.
Georgia's 22-10 record in the SEC indicates a more battle-tested resume compared to Saint Louis's 28-5 record in the A-10.

No. 8 seed Georgia and No. 9 seed Saint Louis play Thursday, March 19, in a March Madness NCAA Tournament first-round game . The Midwest Region game is scheduled for 6:45 p.m. MST and can be seen on CBS ( stream with FUBO ). Who will win the March Madness game and advance to the second round in the NCAA Tournament bracket ? Check out these March Madness picks and March Madness predictions for the men's college basketball NCAA Tournament matchup . Georgia is a 1.5-point favorite over Saint Louis in the game in March Madness odds provided by BetMGM Sportsbook . The Bulldogs are -145 on the moneyline. The Billikens are +118. The over/under for the game is set at 169.5 points. modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.

result.snippet: The Georgia Bulldogs will face the Saint Louis Billikens in the opening round of the NCAA Tournament on Thursday night. Georgia basketball enters the NCAA Tournament as the No. 8 seed in the Midwest Region (Chicago), as the Dawgs held an overall record of 22-10 throughout the regular season. result.snippet: Georgia 2026 NCAA Tournament Preview Mike White has done something remarkable in Athens. The Bulldogs have reached 20 wins for the third straight season, setting a program record with 22 regular-season victories, the most in 121 years of Georgia basketball . This team is explosive in ways that are genuinely entertaining to watch.
